channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: SpaceX slips below its $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch
item.description: The stock has steadily fallen from the euphoric post-IPO high, showing that markets may be sobering up to the promises CEO Elon Musk made before and after SpaceX went public.

item.title: Thinking Machines Lab Drops Its First Model
item.description: Inkling, a 975-billion-parameter open source model, was trained to understand video and audio. It could help Thinking Machines establish itself among competitors like Anthropic and OpenAI.

item.title: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
item.description: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.

item.title: Apple is reportedly shopping for AI chip companies
item.description: Apple's current M2 Ultra-powered servers don't seem to be cutting it, so the company is shopping around for more power.

item.title: Phone maker OnePlus reportedly plans to wind down US and Europe operations
item.description: OnePlus could also wind down its operations in India by 2027

item.title: Suno snatched millions of songs from YouTube, Genius, and Deezer
item.description: Suno data obtained in a hacking incident has exposed that the AI music generator was trained by scraping millions of songs and lyrics from online audio platforms, including YouTube Music, Deezer, and Genius, 404 Media reports. Given that Suno has avoided revealing what's in its training datasets and how they were acquired, this a rare […]

item.title: Google’s biggest clean power project is 40 miles north of xAI’s unpermitted gas power plant
item.description: Google's biggest solar and battery project stands in sharp contrast with xAI's nearby unpermitted power plant.

item.title: ‘A candidate who was hostile from day one never produces that baseline’: Nation states spies applying for legit jobs are hard to spot
item.description: Nation state spies are using AI to create fake identities and realistic job applications, infiltrating organizations to steal intelligence.

item.title: VPN deal of the week: After a year of testing it, this is the VPN I'll be using to stream England vs Argentina
item.description: Make sure football comes home securely with this top VPN

item.title: Lucid’s bankruptcy rumor is a bad sign for the EV future
item.description: Lucid Motors found itself in a tough bind this week, fending off bankruptcy rumors and watching its stock price plunge as a result. The company quickly denied the report, calling it "completely false" and pointing to its available free cash flow as evidence that it has enough runway to operate into next year. But despite […]

item.title: Apple est heureux : ses AirPods et Apple Watch esquivent la loi européenne sur les batteries remplaçables
item.description: L'Apple Watch et les AirPods viennent d'obtenir un laissez-passer de Bruxelles : la loi européenne pour des batteries facilement remplaçables ne s'applique pas à ces produits. Voici pourquoi.

item.title: Experts flag new scam targeting fans seeking tickets for Celine Dion concerts
item.description: Multiple scams targeting Celine Dion fans have already surfaced - it looks like this scam will go on (and on).

item.title: Samsung is making Amazon Music pre-installed bloatware on Galaxy phones
item.description: Don't use Amazon Music? Too bad, Samsung is installing it for you anyway.

item.title: Présidentielle 2027 : Elon Musk affiche son soutien à Marine Le Pen
item.description: Le milliardaire Elon Musk a affiché son soutien public à Marine Le Pen, candidate à l'élection présidentielle de 2027 en France.

item.title: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
item.description: The hacker used an employee's credentials to access source code, which revealed how Suno scraped decades of audio.

item.title: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
item.description: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and discovery features as it expands into new product categories.

item.title: I spent 10 hours comparing two fantastic premium compact cameras, the Lumix L10 and Fujifilm X100VI — here’s which one I’d buy with my own money
item.description: The Panasonic Lumix L10 is billed as a versatile alternative to the viral Fujifilm X100VI, but how do the two cameras compare when using them side by side? I tested them together and have a clear favorite

item.title: England vs Argentina LIVE: Free Streams, TV Guide & How to watch from anywhere
item.description: All the ways you can stream England vs Argentina from anywhere in the world with live updates from the World Cup semi-final.

item.title: Viltrox unveils a miraculously small 'pancake' lens with bright f/2.8 aperture for Sony and Nikon cameras — and it has an innovative feature I love
item.description: Viltrox has revealed its new AF 26mm F2.8 EVO lens, which comes in Sony E and Nikon Z-mount versions, measures 23.8mm thick and weighs just 130g.

item.title: The GMKtec G10 mini PC is 'a terrific little system' — and now our top budget machine gets a big discount
item.description: This compact desktop is ideal for general productivity and day-to-day work.

item.title: Agricultural technologies of future: automation of agriculture in Global South | KBC Digital
item.description: ... agricultural sector. “Internet of Things (IoT) systems and sensors enable more precise control over the use of water and fertilisers, which ...

item.title: Netflix tries to recapture Stranger Things magic with nostalgic re-release
item.description: Netflix just can't let Stranger Things go. Since the final episode aired on New Year's Eve there's been a behind-the-scenes documentary, an animated series that expands the story, and now, on the 10th anniversary of the show's original release, Netflix has released a new version of the show's first season. The episodes have all been […]

item.title: Notée 8/10, cette excellente barre de son Dolby Atmos signée Samsung perd près de 20 % pour la fin des soldes
item.description: Grâce à l'application SmartThings, la Samsung HW-QS90H peut se calibrer automatiquement en fonction de n'importe quelle pièce. Ainsi, cette barre de son s'adapte à tous les intérieurs et elle est à découvrir à prix réduit grâce à une offre d'Amazon.

item.title: Steam fan finds 'cheap SSDs' to make retro 'game cartridges' system — the only problem is 2026 is the worst year in history to do it
item.description: PC physical copies could be a thing again, after this Steam gamer found a unique but expensive way to do it.

item.title: Lionel Messi’s Final World Cup—and the Death of Early Retirement
item.description: Argentina’s Lionel Messi was supposed to be done years ago. Now, sports science is helping soccer’s biggest stars rewrite the rules of aging.

item.title: The Batman Part II's release date has been pushed back to early 2028 — and its latest delay is going to have a major impact on James Gunn's DC Universe
item.description: The Robert Pattinson-starring sequel's latest launch delay means we'll have to wait another four months for its arrival.

item.title: You'll soon be able to play the biggest football game on your iPhone thanks to an upcoming Apple Arcade release with zero microtransactions
item.description: Apple Arcade subscribers are about to get their own version of Madden NFL 27.

item.title: My favorite clitoral suction toy is finally back on the market (and its $40 off)
item.description: Biird Namii 2, a popular clitoral suction toy, is back on the market and on sale

item.title: Valve appears to be discontinuing self-repair parts for the LCD Steam Deck at iFixit
item.description: An iFixit staffer told a Steam Deck user that the company had no plans to stock replacement OEM batteries.

item.title: Anker's compact Solix S2000 home backup battery is 50% off and can run your fridge for 35 hours
item.description: This 2KWh portable power station is a delightfully svelte home backup solution.

item.title: Score: Erling Haalands go-to headphones are on sale for up to 51% off
item.description: Two pairs of Beats headphones worn by Norwegian World Cup star Erling Haaland are currently on sale for up to 51% off.

item.title: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
item.description: Microsoft's monthly release of security fixes, dubbed Patch Tuesday, resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across the company's product line, thanks to discoveries with AI.

item.title: Quand Volkswagen se met au vélo électrique : cockpit avec caméra de recul, casques et lunettes connectés au menu
item.description: Malgré une activité automobile en berne, le groupe Volkswagen mise sur la mobilité douce via deux nouveaux vélos électriques Crossover et Sport eBike, conçus avec n+.

item.title: Nintendo Switch : un guide officiel vous montre les 13 étapes pour remplacer la batterie des nouveaux Joy-Con
item.description: Nintendo a publié sa documentation officielle pour vous montrer comment remplacer la batterie des nouveaux Joy-Con européens de la première Nintendo Switch.

item.title: Fin de OnePlus en Europe : restructuration, suivi clientèle… tout ce qu’il faut savoir
item.description: La marque OnePlus en Europe connaît de nouvelles turbulences avec un futur incertain. Les informations que nous avons reçues évoquent une restructuration et une disparition du marché européen. Voici notre récapitulatif complet de la situation du constructeur chinois.

item.title: A hacker accessed Suno source code that reportedly details how the company scraped millions of songs
item.description: Suno says it was breached in November and "no sensitive personal information was compromised."

item.title: Get a free sub from Firehouse Subs when MLB games go into extra innings. Heres how.
item.description: Firehouse Subs and MLB announced a new partnership and promotion. Starting July 17, buy a sub and get a sub for free. Here's how.
